ast.name: error
ast.target: 已达到最大嵌套10个span的限制！！！

ast.name: info
ast.source: Flashcards: Cards not in Anki (maybe deleted)
ast.target: 闪卡：不在Anki中的卡片（可能已删除）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Test that connection between Anki and Obsidian actually works.
ast.target: 测试Anki与Obsidian之间的连接是否正常工作。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Add the ancestor headings to the question of the flashcard.
ast.target: 将上级标题添加到闪卡的问题中。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Add to every card the source, i.e. the link to the original card. NOTE: Old cards made without source support cannot be updated.
ast.target: 为每张卡片添加来源，即原始卡片的链接。注意：不支持来源的旧卡片无法更新。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Add highlight of the code in Anki.
ast.target: 在Anki中添加代码高亮支持。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Add ID to end of line for inline cards.
ast.target: 为行内卡片在行尾添加ID。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The name of the default deck where the cards will be added when not specified.
ast.target: 未指定时，卡片将被添加到的默认牌组名称。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: This tag will be added to each generated card on Anki
ast.target: 此标签将添加到Anki中生成的每张卡片上。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The tag to identify the flashcards in the notes (case-insensitive).
ast.target: 用于在笔记中识别闪卡的标签（不区分大小写）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The separator to identifty the inline cards in the notes.
ast.target: 用于在笔记中识别行内卡片的分隔符。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The separator to identifty the inline revese cards in the notes.
ast.target: 用于在笔记中识别行内反向卡片的分隔符。

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 基于文件夹的牌组名称

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Something went wrong, is Anki open?

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: The deck name must be at least 1 character long
ast.target: 牌组名称至少需要1个字符

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: No default tags will be added

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: The tag must be at least 1 character long

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: The separator must be at least 1 character long
ast.target: 分隔符至少需要1个字符

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: The separator must be different from the inline reverse separator
ast.target: 分隔符必须与行内反向分隔符不同

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: The separator must be different from the inline separator
ast.target: 分隔符必须与行内分隔符不同

ast.name: description
ast.source: Tries to smartly fix indentation in es6 strings
ast.target: 尝试智能修复ES6字符串中的缩进

ast.name: description
ast.source: Disables the requirement of indenting nested sublists by 4 spaces
ast.target: 禁用嵌套子列表必须缩进4个空格的要求

ast.name: description
ast.source:
Parses simple line breaks as
(GFM Style)
ast.target:
将简单换行解析为
（GFM风格）

ast.name: description
ast.source: Makes adding a space between `#` and the header text mandatory (GFM Style)
ast.target: 使在`#`和标题文本之间添加空格成为强制要求（GFM风格）

ast.name: description
ast.source: Changes the link generated by @mentions. Only applies if ghMentions option is enabled.
ast.target: 更改由@提及生成的链接。仅在启用ghMentions选项时适用。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Encode e-mail addresses through the use of Character Entities, transforming ASCII e-mail addresses into its equivalent decimal entities
ast.target: 通过使用字符实体对电子邮件地址进行编码，将ASCII电子邮件地址转换为其等效的十进制实体

ast.name: description
ast.source: Open all links in new windows
ast.target: 在新窗口中打开所有链接

ast.name: description
ast.source:
Support for HTML Tag escaping. ex:
foo

ast.name: description
ast.source: Enable emoji support. Ex: `this is a :smile: emoji`
ast.target: 启用表情符号支持。例如：`this is a :smile: emoji`

ast.name: description
ast.source: Enable support for underline. Syntax is double or triple underscores: `__underline word__`. With this option enabled, underscores no longer parses into `<em>` and `<strong>`
ast.target: 启用下划线支持。语法为双下划线或三下划线：`__underline word__`。启用此选项后，下划线不再解析为`<em>`和`<strong>`

ast.name: description
ast.source: Outputs a complete html document, including `<html>`, `<head>` and `<body>` tags
ast.target: 输出完整的HTML文档，包括`<html>`、`<head>`和`<body>`标签

ast.name: description
ast.source: Enable support for document metadata (defined at the top of the document between `«««` and `»»»` or between `---` and `---`).
ast.target: 启用文档元数据支持（定义在文档顶部，位于`«««`和`»»»`之间或`---`和`---`之间）。
